scripts.conformance: fail=0; for p in packages/*/; do [ -d "${p}src" ] || continue; echo "==> validate ${p}"; pnpm dlx @xfcfam/tools@${XFTOOLS_VERSION:-latest} validate "$p" || fail=1; done; [ "$fail" -eq 0 ] || { echo "XF conformance gate failed: a package is below Λ=3 (not well-formed)" >&2; exit 1; }; echo "XF conformance gate passed: all packages well-formed (Λ≥3)"
